cases.description: Relative ranking: salad < dal meal < rice+chicken < chicken biryani < cake+ice cream
Yogurt-like variants should degrade from exact_fii -> mapped_fii -> macro_fallback
Chicken biryani acute estimates should increase with 0.5x, 1x, 1.5x portions
7 low-load days then 7 high-load days should show gradual rise in rolling chronic metrics
Mixed-source meal should have lower estimate quality and confidence than all-exact control

warning: Implementation parity fixtures only; passing parity is not scientific validation.
